title: Daewoo Essentials 2 Slice Sandwich Toaster Deep Fill, Non-stick Toasting Plates, Built In Handle With Locking Clip, Indicator Light, Non-slip Feet, Easy To Clean, Portable, Lightweight, Compact, White
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Quick & Efficient Toasting – With 750W of power, enjoy perfectly sealed toasted sandwiches in just minutes, ideal for busy mornings, quick lunches or late-night snacks
Non-Stick Cooking Plates – Easy-release non-stick plates reduce mess and make clean-up a breeze. Just wipe clean, no scrubbing needed
Dual Indicator Lights – Power and Ready lights let you know exactly when to start cooking. No guesswork, just delicious results every time
Safe & Compact Design – Features a latch lock, cool-touch handle, and non-slip base for safe operation. Compact size is perfect for student kitchens or small homes
Versatile Everyday Use – Great for classic toasties, kids’ meals, or creative snack ideas. Works with bread, wraps, and pre-cooked fillings
description: From the manufacturer LARGE CAPACITY Inside the toaster can fit up to 4 pocket sized sandwiches and has special deep pan plates to ensure the contents of your sandwich stay put during preparation. COLOUR INDICATOR LIGHTS With the 'Power' and 'Ready' indicator light you will be able to know exactly when the non stick plates have heated up completely and are ready for use. SAFE AND SECURE The anti-slip feet ensure that the toaster will not move while in use and the handle lock protects your hands and the contents of the toaster.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎750W fast heating power, non-stick cooking plates, dual indicator lights (power and ready), latch locking mechanism, cool-touch exterior, compact and lightweight design, easy-clean wipeable surface, upright storage-friendly, integrated handle for safe operation
